meanings.definition: dispose or incline or entice to
examples: We were tempted by the delicious-looking food

meanings.definition: provoke someone to do something through (often false or exaggerated) promises or persuasion
give rise to a desire by being attractive or inviting
examples: the window displays tempted the shoppers

meanings.definition: induce into action by using one's charm
examples: She charmed him into giving her all his money
St. Anthony was tempted in the desert

meanings.definition: highly attractive and able to arouse hope or desire
examples: the voice was low and beguiling
difficult to say no to an enticing advertisement
